sourceWorkbook: Pipay Cup ACS OTP Authentication Flows English Test Case@2026-06-29.xlsx

cases.functionPoint:
OTP transaction successful
Authorization check CAVV value - Correct
steps: Open the website of the trading test - Demo web
Display the corresponding language according to the browser language
Open the website of the trading test - Demo web
Display the corresponding language according to the browser language
Transaction Verification page, enter wrong verification code and click "Submit"
Enter the correct verification code, click "Submit" to complete the verification

cases.functionPoint: Verification code error - Exceeded maximum number of errors - initiate transaction again
steps: Open the website of the trading test - Demo web
Display the corresponding language according to the browser language
Repeat steps 6~7 until the maximum number of errors is exceeded
Open the website of the trading test - Demo web
Display the corresponding language according to the browser language
Open the website of the trading test (Demo web)
Enter the test card number and parameter values, then select 'PA' from the Message Category

Incorrect verification code. You have 4 attempt(s) remaining.

prompts: UI and page format display correctly
Title： Purchase Authentication
Page Content：
We just sent you a verification code to your mobile application or your number  ******0036.
Merchant: HiTRUST EMV Demo Merchant
Total amount: 10000.00 TWD
Transaction time: 2026-06-29 03:10:28
Input Prompt: Enter verification code:
Submit OTP button: SUBMIT
Resend OTP button: RESEND CODE
Help Title: I didn't receive the code.
Help Content: help_text: For further questions, please contact our call center 093 988 983/089 988 983

steps: Open the website of the trading test - Demo web
Display the corresponding language according to the browser language

prompts: UI and page format display correctly
Title：交易验证
Page Content：
我们已将验证码发送到您的手机应用程序或号码 ******0036
商店: HiTRUST EMV Demo Merchant
购买金额: 10000.00 TWD
Input Prompt: 请输入验证码:
Submit OTP button: 提交
Resend OTP button: 重新获取验证码
Help Title: 收不到验证码？
Help Content: 如您有其他疑问，请致电我们的客服中心 093 988 983 / 089 988 983。

steps: Open the website of the trading test - Demo web
Display the corresponding language according to the browser language

prompts: UI and page format display correctly
Title：การยืนยันการซื้อ
Page Content：
เราเพิ่งส่งรหัสยืนยันไปยังแอปพลิเคชันมือถือของคุณหรือหมายเลข ******5666 ของคุณแล้ว.
ผู้ค้า: HiTRUST EMV Demo Merchant
ยอดรวมทั้งหมด: 1.00 TWD
Input Prompt: กรอกรหัสยืนยัน:
Submit OTP button: ส่ง
Resend OTP button: ส่งรหัสอีกครั้ง
Help Title: ฉันไม่ได้รับรหัส.
Help Content: หากมีข้อสงสัยเพิ่มเติม กรุณาติดต่อศูนย์บริการลูกค้าของเรา 093 988 983/089 988 983

steps: Open the website of the trading test - Demo web
Display the corresponding language according to the browser language

prompts: UI and page format display correctly
Title：ការផ្ទៀងផ្ទាត់ការទិញ
Page Content：
ពួកយើងទើបតែផ្ញើលេខកូដផ្ទៀងផ្ទាត់​ទៅកាន់កម្មវិធីទូរស័ព្ទរបស់អ្នក ឬក៏តាមលេខទូរស័ព្ទរបស់អ្នក ******5666 ។
ពាណិជ្ជករ: HiTRUST EMV Demo Merchant
ចំនួនទឹកប្រាក់សរុប: 1.00 TWD
Input Prompt: បញ្ចូលលេខកូដផ្ទៀងផ្ទាត់:
Submit OTP button: បញ្ចូន
Resend OTP button: ផ្ញើលេខកូដឡើងវិញ
Help Title: ខ្ញុំមិនបានទទួលលេខកូដទេ។
Help Content: សំរាប់ការសាកសួរព័ត៌មានបន្ថែម, សូមជួយទំនាក់ទំនងមកកាន់ភ្នាក់ងារកណ្តាលរបស់ពួកយើងបានតាមរយៈលេខ ០៩៣​ ៩៨៨ ៩៨៣/០៨៩ ៩៨៨ ៩៨៣

Title：ការផ្ទៀងផ្ទាត់ការទិញ
Page Content：
ពួកយើងទើបតែផ្ញើលេខកូដផ្ទៀងផ្ទាត់​ទៅកាន់កម្មវិធីទូរស័ព្ទរបស់អ្នក ឬក៏តាមលេខទូរស័ព្ទរបស់អ្នក ******5666 ។
ពាណិជ្ជករ: HiTRUST EMV Demo Merchant
ចំនួនទឹកប្រាក់សរុប: 1.00 TWD
Input Prompt: បញ្ចូលលេខកូដផ្ទៀងផ្ទាត់:
Submit OTP button: បញ្ចូន
Resend OTP button: ផ្ញើលេខកូដឡើងវិញ(13)
Help Title: ខ្ញុំមិនបានទទួលលេខកូដទេ។
Help Content: សំរាប់ការសាកសួរព័ត៌មានបន្ថែម, សូមជួយទំនាក់ទំនងមកកាន់ភ្នាក់ងារកណ្តាលរបស់ពួកយើងបានតាមរយៈលេខ ០៩៣​ ៩៨៨ ៩៨៣/០៨៩ ៩៨៨ ៩៨៣

Title： Purchase Authentication
Page Content：
We just sent you a verification code to your mobile application or your number ******0036.
Merchant: HiTRUST EMV Demo Merchant
Amount: 10000.00 TWD
Transaction time: 2026-06-29 03:11:01
The verification code has expired, please get a new one.
Input Prompt: Enter verification code:
Submit OTP button: SUBMIT
Resend OTP button: RESEND CODE
Help Title: I didn't receive the code.
Help Content: help_text: For further questions, please contact our call center 093 988 983/089 988 983

Title：交易验证
Page Content：
我们已将验证码发送到您的手机应用程序或号码 ******0036
商店: HiTRUST EMV Demo Merchant
购买金额: 10000.00 TWD
密码已逾时，请重新取得密码
Input Prompt: 请输入验证码:
Submit OTP button: 提交
Resend OTP button: 重新获取验证码
Help Title: 收不到验证码？
Help Content: 如您有其他疑问，请致电我们的客服中心 093 988 983 / 089 988 983。

Title：การยืนยันการซื้อ
Page Content：
เราเพิ่งส่งรหัสยืนยันไปยังแอปพลิเคชันมือถือของคุณหรือหมายเลข ******5666 ของคุณแล้ว.
ผู้ค้า: HiTRUST EMV Demo Merchant
ยอดรวมทั้งหมด: 1.00 TWD
รหัสตรวจสอบหมดอายุ กรุณารับรหัสใหม่.
Input Prompt: กรอกรหัสยืนยัน:
Submit OTP button: ส่ง
Resend OTP button: ส่งรหัสอีกครั้ง
Help Title: ฉันไม่ได้รับรหัส.
Help Content: หากมีข้อสงสัยเพิ่มเติม กรุณาติดต่อศูนย์บริการลูกค้าของเรา 093 988 983/089 988 983
